attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF and Convert to PDF/A-3B
attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a ZUGFeRD XML invoice into a PDF, set the AFRelationship to Data, and convert the document to PDF/A‑3B for ZUGFeRD compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑compliant Invoice PDF
create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.description: Shows how to load a human‑readable invoice PDF, embed ZUGFeRD XML data, convert the document to PDF/A‑3 (ZUGFeRD) format, and save the resulting compliant invoice.

validate-pdf-zugferd-compliance.title: Validate PDF for ZUGFeRD Compliance
validate-pdf-zugferd-compliance.description: Shows how to create a minimal PDF and validate it against the ZUGFeRD specification using Aspose.Pdf, writing validation details to a log file.

extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the embedded ZUGFeRD XML attachment, and save it to a local file.

update-zugferd-xml-attachment.title: Update ZUGFeRD XML Attachment in PDF
update-zugferd-xml-attachment.description: Shows how to replace the embedded ZUGFeRD XML file in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's BindXml method and then save the updated document.

remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove ZUGFeRD Attachment from PDF
remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the ZUGFeRD XML attachment, and save the document while keeping all other content intact.

add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to ZUGFeRD PDF
add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.description: Shows how to load a ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add custom metadata entries such as ProjectCode and Department, and save the updated document.

encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.title: Encrypt ZUGFeRD PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.description: Shows how to load a ZUGFeRD PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with both user and owner passwords, set specific permissions, and save the encrypted document.

sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestamp.title: Digitally Sign a ZUGFeRD PDF with Timestamp
sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestamp.description: Demonstrates loading a ZUGFeRD PDF, adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX file, and attaching a timestamp from a TSA service, then saving the signed document.

add-expiry-javascript-action-to-pdf.title: Add Expiry JavaScript Action to PDF
add-expiry-javascript-action-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a document‑level JavaScript open action that checks an expiry date and automatically closes the PDF when the date has passed.

add-js-open-action-navigate-page-10.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Navigate to Page 10
add-js-open-action-navigate-page-10.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a JavaScript open action that jumps to page 10 when the document opens, and saving the modified file.

add-page-level-javascript-alert.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
add-page-level-javascript-alert.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript action that shows an alert when a specific PDF page is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

calculate-total-order-amount-pdf-form.title: Calculate Total Order Amount with JavaScript in PDF Form
calculate-total-order-amount-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates embedding and executing JavaScript in an Aspose.Pdf form to sum line‑item quantities and prices and write the result to a Total field.

add-auto-save-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Save JavaScript to PDF Document
add-auto-save-javascript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a document‑level JavaScript action that automatically saves the PDF at defined intervals when the file is opened.

draw-star-shape-pdf-operators.title: Draw a Star Shape Using Low‑Level PDF Operators
draw-star-shape-pdf-operators.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf low‑level graphics operators to draw a custom 5‑pointed star at specified coordinates, including setting stroke/fill colors and line width.

modify-pdf-line-width-operators.title: Modify PDF Line Width Operators from 1 to 3 Points
modify-pdf-line-width-operators.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's content operators, detect SetLineWidth operators, and change a line width of 1 point to 3 points before saving the document.

remove-background-operators-from-pdf.title: Remove Background Graphics Operators from PDF
remove-background-operators-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating each page's content stream, identifying fill/stroke operators that create background graphics, deleting them in batch, and saving the cleaned document.

replace-text-using-showtext-operators.title: Replace Text in PDF Using ShowText Operators
replace-text-using-showtext-operators.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate low‑level content operators, locate ShowText (Tj) operators, replace a target string, and save the modified document.

create-line-graph-multiple-stroke-styles.title: Create Line Graph with Multiple Stroke Styles
create-line-graph-multiple-stroke-styles.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF line graph with three series, each using a different stroke style (solid, dashed, dotted) via Aspose.Pdf.

embed-vector-graphic-in-pdf.title: Embed Vector Graphic in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
embed-vector-graphic-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a Graph container, draw vector shapes such as a rectangle and a line, and embed the resulting vector graphic directly into a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

combine-multiple-graphs-2x2-grid.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page in a 2x2 Grid
combine-multiple-graphs-2x2-grid.description: Shows how to create several Aspose.Pdf Graph objects and arrange them on one PDF page using a two‑by‑two grid layout.

add-file-attachment-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed an external PDF as a file attachment annotation, set its description and icon, and save the updated document using Aspose.PDF.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF with Custom Descriptions
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add several file attachment annotations to a PDF, each with its own MIME type, description, and icon, using Aspose.Pdf.

list-pdf-attachments-sizes.title: List PDF Attachments and Their Sizes
list-pdf-attachments-sizes.description: Loads a PDF file, iterates over its embedded files collection, and prints each attachment's name and size in bytes.

remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a particular embedded file from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping all other attachments intact.

update-pdf-attachment-description.title: Update PDF Attachment Description
update-pdf-attachment-description.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate file attachment annotations, and modify the description of the attached file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-title-author-invoice-number.title: Set PDF Title, Author, and Custom Invoice Number Property
set-pdf-title-author-invoice-number.description: Shows how to assign the PDF document title, author, and add a custom property for the invoice number using Aspose.Pdf.

read-custom-pdf-metadata-audit.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata and Log for Auditing
read-custom-pdf-metadata-audit.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract only custom metadata entries, and write them to a log file for audit purposes.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-with-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256-with-passwords.description: Shows how to apply AES‑256 encryption to a PDF, set separate user and owner passwords, and define permissions using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-printing-only.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Printing Only
set-pdf-permissions-allow-printing-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, granting only printing permission while disabling content extraction and annotation modifications.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-pfx-timestamp.title: Digitally Sign PDF with PFX Certificate and Timestamp
digitally-sign-pdf-with-pfx-timestamp.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF, sign it using a PFX certificate via PKCS#7, apply a timestamp, and save the signed document.

verify-pdf-digital-signature.title: Verify PDF Digital Signature and Retrieve Signer Details
verify-pdf-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to detect compromised signatures, iterate through signature fields, verify each digital signature, and extract signer information from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.description: Shows how to load a PDF and save it as a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf while preserving the original layout, fonts, and tables.

convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Images
convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-images.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single HTML document while embedding all resources, including raster images as Base64‑encoded data URIs.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-png.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-png.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set a 300 DPI resolution, and convert each page to a PNG image file.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF files in a folder and convert each page to a high‑resolution JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf, naming the output files after the source PDF.

export-selected-pdf-pages.title: Export Selected PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-selected-pdf-pages.description: Loads a PDF, extracts specified pages, and saves each page as an individual PDF while preserving its original size and orientation.

merge-multiple-pdfs-preserving-bookmarks.title: Merge Multiple PDFs Preserving Bookmarks
merge-multiple-pdfs-preserving-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to combine several PDF files into a single document while keeping the original bookmarks and outline hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF file.

extract-text-from-pdf-preserving-line-br.title: Extract Text from PDF Preserving Line Breaks
extract-text-from-pdf-preserving-line-br.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure text extraction options to keep formatting, and retrieve the full text including line breaks and spacing.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF with Original Format
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, absorb image placements, and save each embedded image while preserving its original format and resolution.

extract-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Extract PDF Form Fields to JSON
extract-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to a JSON file, and optionally read the generated JSON content.

populate-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.title: Populate PDF Form from JSON and Flatten
populate-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, filling its form fields using data from a JSON file, flattening the form to make the values permanent, and saving the result.

print-pdf-silently-to-default-printer.title: Print PDF Silently to Default Printer
print-pdf-silently-to-default-printer.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rendering each page to an image, and sending the images to the default printer without showing any print dialog.

add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page 5
add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.description: Demonstrates how to assign a JavaScript open action to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that the document automatically navigates to page five when opened.

auto-print-pdf-on-open.title: Auto‑Print PDF on Open with JavaScript Action
auto-print-pdf-on-open.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that the print dialog appears automatically when the document is opened.

set-pdf-author-to-current-user.title: Set PDF Author to Current System User
set-pdf-author-to-current-user.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign the Author metadata to the current Windows user, and save the modified document.

hide-show-pdf-form-field-with-checkbox.title: Hide/Show PDF Form Field with Checkbox JavaScript
hide-show-pdf-form-field-with-checkbox.description: Shows how to add a checkbox and a text box to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, attach JavaScript to the checkbox to hide or show the text box based on its checked state, and save the resulting document.

embed-qr-code-using-low-level-operators.title: Embed QR Code Image Using Low-Level PDF Operators
embed-qr-code-using-low-level-operators.description: Demonstrates how to add a QR code image to a specific location on a PDF page by inserting low‑level PDF operators (q, cm, Do, Q) with Aspose.Pdf.

compress-pdf-and-optimize-images.title: Compress PDF and Optimize Images
compress-pdf-and-optimize-images.description: Demonstrates how to reduce a PDF file size by applying optimization options, including object compression and image down‑sampling, using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-2b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑2b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-2b.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF/A‑2b archival format, and saving the compliant file.

add-xmp-metadata-pdfa-compliance.title: Add XMP Metadata for PDF/A Compliance
add-xmp-metadata-pdfa-compliance.description: Demonstrates how to embed required XMP metadata entries, including document ID and creator tool, to make a PDF conform to PDF/A‑1a using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdfa-after-zugferd-attachment.title: Validate PDF/A compliance after adding ZUGFeRD attachment
validate-pdfa-after-zugferd-attachment.description: Loads a PDF/A document, embeds a ZUGFeRD XML invoice as an attachment, saves the result, and checks that the PDF remains PDF/A‑1b compliant.

convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.title: Convert PDF with ZUGFeRD to PDF/A‑3U preserving XML
convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.description: Shows how to load a PDF that contains a ZUGFeRD XML attachment and convert it to PDF/A‑3U while keeping the embedded data intact.

extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract and Validate ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Shows how to pull an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file out of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and then validate it against the official ZUGFeRD XSD schema.

embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf-invoice.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF Invoice using Aspose.Pdf
embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf-invoice.description: Shows how to generate a simple ZUGFeRD XML document from an order and embed it as an attachment in a PDF invoice with Aspose.Pdf.

batch-generate-zugferd-pdfs-from-csv.title: Batch Generate ZUGFeRD‑Compliant PDFs from CSV
batch-generate-zugferd-pdfs-from-csv.description: Demonstrates how to read invoice data from a CSV file, create a PDF for each invoice with Aspose.Pdf, attach the corresponding ZUGFeRD XML, and save the PDFs in a batch process.

embed-custom-font-and-draw-graph.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font and Draw Graph in PDF
embed-custom-font-and-draw-graph.description: Demonstrates loading and embedding a TrueType font, applying it to a text fragment, and creating a graph with rectangle, line, and ellipse shapes in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-subset-custom-font-pdf.title: Embed and Subset Custom Font in PDF
embed-subset-custom-font-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font, applying it to existing text fragments, and using FontUtilities.SubsetFonts to embed only the required glyphs, reducing the PDF file size.

hide-toolbar-menu-bar-pdf.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF via JavaScript
hide-toolbar-menu-bar-pdf.description: Shows how to set PDF viewer preferences and add an open‑action JavaScript that hides the toolbar and menu bar when the document is opened.

add-javascript-calculate-total-pdf.title: Add JavaScript to Calculate Total from Line Items in PDF
add-javascript-calculate-total-pdf.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF form field with Aspose.Pdf to sum line‑item fields and display the total in a summary field.

add-semi-transparent-background-watermar.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-background-watermar.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent text watermark behind existing content on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-form-filling-only-security.title: Apply Form-Filling Only Security to PDF
apply-form-filling-only-security.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with Aspose.Pdf so that only form filling is permitted while editing, printing, and content extraction are blocked.

remove-javascript-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript and Embedded Files from PDF
remove-javascript-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions, clear the OpenAction, and remove file attachment annotations to harden a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

list-javascript-actions-in-pdf.title: List JavaScript Actions in a PDF Document
list-javascript-actions-in-pdf.description: Shows how to extract both document‑level and page‑level JavaScript scripts from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for auditing purposes.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi-Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF document into a multi‑page TIFF file, preserving each PDF page as a separate TIFF layer with custom resolution and TIFF settings.

generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.description: Creates a 150x150 PNG thumbnail for each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice and saves the images to the specified directory.

extract-text-pdf-search-index.title: Extract Text from PDFs and Build a Searchable JSON Index
extract-text-pdf-search-index.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files, extract their full text using Aspose.Pdf, and store the results in a JSON‑based searchable index.

embed-audio-with-js-playback.title: Embed Audio with JavaScript Playback in PDF
embed-audio-with-js-playback.description: Shows how to create a PDF, embed a WAV audio file as a SoundAnnotation, and add a button that plays the audio using JavaScript actions.

encrypt-pdf-with-embedded-attachment.title: Encrypt PDF with Embedded Attachment
encrypt-pdf-with-embedded-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF and encrypting the entire document (including the attachment) with user and owner passwords using AES‑256.

set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.title: Set PDF Creation and Modification Dates
set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the creation and modification timestamps of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

draw-pie-chart-using-low-level-pdf-opera.title: Draw Pie Chart Using Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-pie-chart-using-low-level-pdf-opera.description: The example creates a PDF document and draws a pie chart by manually constructing each slice with low-level PDF drawing operators, assigning distinct fill colors to each slice.

render-pdf-pages-to-png-high-quality-ant.title: Render PDF Pages to PNG with High‑Quality Anti‑Aliasing
render-pdf-pages-to-png-high-quality-ant.description: The example loads a PDF document and saves each page as a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf rendering options with high‑quality interpolation enabled, resulting in smoother lines and curves.

create-layered-graphics-with-transparenc.title: Create Layered Graphics with Transparency in PDF
create-layered-graphics-with-transparenc.description: Demonstrates how to add optional‑content groups (layers) and draw semi‑transparent shapes such as a rectangle, ellipse, and line using Aspose.Pdf graphics objects.

add-javascript-password-prompt-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Password Prompt to PDF
add-javascript-password-prompt-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf so that a password is requested when the document opens, closing the file if the password is incorrect.

create-pdf-signature-field-js-validation.title: Create PDF with Signature Field and JavaScript Validation
create-pdf-signature-field-js-validation.description: Shows how to add a digital signature field to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and attach JavaScript that executes when the user signs the field.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all its annotations, and writes them to an XFDF file for external processing or archiving.

import-fdf-data-into-pdf-and-flatten-for.title: Import FDF Data into PDF and Flatten Form
import-fdf-data-into-pdf-and-flatten-for.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing form field values from an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf, flattening the form to make fields non‑editable, and saving the updated document.

set-pdf-document-language.title: Set PDF Document Language for Accessibility
set-pdf-document-language.description: Demonstrates how to set the primary language of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API, improving screen‑reader accessibility, and then saves the updated document.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-password.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Password Protection
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-password.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf by applying the same user and owner passwords and setting specific permissions.

add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Close JavaScript to PDF
add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF that automatically closes the document after a specified timeout using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-toggle-pdf-form-sections.title: Add JavaScript to Toggle PDF Form Sections
add-javascript-toggle-pdf-form-sections.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to show or hide optional sections based on a user's selection in a form field.
